title: Previous/next iteration added to the the Jobs API
body:
<!-- If you need to report a security issue please visit https://docs.dapr.io/operations/support/support-security-issues -->

## In what area(s)?

<!-- Remove the '> ' to select -->

/area runtime

## Describe the feature
Today with the Jobs API there is no way to see data around the previous or next time the job is scheduled to be triggered. This makes it difficult to use the API in any sort of complex scenario or business logic like monitoring a scheduled task.

The following should either be added to the [Get job data](https://v1-14.docs.dapr.io/reference/api/jobs_api/#get-job-data) endpoint `GET http://localhost:3500/v1.0-alpha1/jobs/<name>` OR additional endpoints should be added to get previous or next iteration.

Additional data:
- next time the scheduled job will occur
- last time the scheduled job occured

## Release Note
<!-- How should this new feature be announced in our release notes? It can be populated later. -->
<!-- Keep it as a single line. Examples: -->

RELEASE NOTE: **ADD** Previous/next iteration job API details.
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **FIX** Bug in runtime. -->
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **UPDATE** Runtime dependency. -->
